recommendations.title: Shaft
recommendations.overview: Cool Black private eye John Shaft is hired by a crime lord to find and retrieve his kidnapped daughter.

recommendations.title: Into the Labyrinth
recommendations.overview: When a kidnapping victim turns up alive after fifteen years, a profiler and a private investigator try to piece together the mystery.

recommendations.title: 10 Days of a Bad Man
recommendations.overview: Battered, broken and bereaved, a private investigator must muscle his way through a tangle of lies to uncover the truth behind a mansion murder.

recommendations.title: The Big Sleep
recommendations.overview: Private Investigator Philip Marlowe is hired by wealthy General Sternwood regarding a matter involving his youngest daughter Carmen. Before the complex case is over, Marlowe sees murder, blackmail, deception, and what might be love.

recommendations.title: Zone 414
recommendations.overview: In the near future on a colony of state-of-the-art robots, a private investigator is hired by the colony's creator to bring his missing daughter home.

recommendations.title: Who's Harry Crumb?
recommendations.overview: Harry Crumb is a bumbling and inept private investigator who is hired to solve the kidnapping of a young heiress which he's not expected to solve because his employer is the mastermind behind the kidnapping.

recommendations.title: I Am All Girls
recommendations.overview: A special crimes investigator forms an unlikely bond with a serial killer to bring down a global child sex trafficking syndicate.

recommendations.title: Wander
recommendations.overview: After getting hired to probe a suspicious death in the small town of Wander, a mentally unstable private investigator becomes convinced the case is linked to the same 'conspiracy cover up' that caused the death of his daughter.

recommendations.title: Arkansas
recommendations.overview: Kyle and Swin live by the orders of an Arkansas-based drug kingpin named Frog, whom they've never met. But when a deal goes horribly wrong, the consequences are deadly.

recommendations.title: Hollywoodland
recommendations.overview: When Hollywood superstar George Reeves dies in his home, private detective Louis Simo is hired to investigate his death and gets caught in a web of lies involving a big studio executive's wife. Based on a true story.
